news.headline: Together AI raises $800M at $8.3B valuation
news.detail: The AI infrastructure platform enables enterprises to train and deploy open-source models, reporting over $1.15 billion in annual bookings.

news.headline: Anthropic signs 20-year, $19B AI infrastructure lease
news.detail: The frontier AI lab locked down dedicated compute capacity in Kentucky, showing how critical long-term infrastructure control has become.

news.headline: Indian entrepreneur bootstraps $30M AI Office competitor
news.detail: Serial founder Bhavin Turakhia self-funded Neo with his own capital, building the platform in three months using generative AI.

news.headline: Taktile secures $110M for AI decision platform
news.detail: The fintech startup automates regulated workflows like loan approvals and fraud triage for banks while preserving human oversight.
